---
title: "Life Expectancy and Population"
---
We are looking to examine if the size of a country's population has any sort of effect on Life Expectancy

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv('gapminder.csv')
plt.scatter(df['population_millions'], df['life_expectancy'], color='red')
plt.title("Population vs Life Expectancy")
plt.xlabel("Population (Millions)")
plt.ylabel("Life Expectancy")
plt.show()
```
